svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Orquestador-Agente-Atencion" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-744" dy="-414" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="1550" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="lg_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;" value="Leyenda" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="40" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Orquestador / Supervisor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="40" y="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Agente especializado" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="40" y="108" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Tools / MCP / Skills" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="40" y="144" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg4" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Decisión" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="40" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Memoria / estado" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="40" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Handoff humano" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="40" y="256" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Mensaje entrante
(canal / Chatwoot)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="480" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctx" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Orquestador — Ensamblar contexto
(historial + memoria + perfil del cliente)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="460" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gate" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="¿Bot activo?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="500" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="router" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Supervisor — Clasificar intención
y enrutar al agente adecuado" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="460" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_faq" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Agente FAQ / Conocimiento" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="140" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_appt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Agente Citas / Reservas" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="500" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_acct" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Agente Cuenta / Soporte" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="860" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_faq" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="RAG · Base de conocimiento" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="140" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_appt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Tools / MCP citas
(leer · agendar)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="500" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_acct" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Tools / MCP cuenta · skills" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="860" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d_res" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="¿Resuelto y
dentro de alcance?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="200" x="500" y="900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="compose" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Componer respuesta
+ guardrails / tono" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="280" x="460" y="1090" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="send" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="Enviar respuesta al cliente" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="480" y="1210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="persist" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Persistir memoria / estado
de la conversación" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="480" y="1320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Fin del turno" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="500" y="1430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="human" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Handoff a humano
(bot-off)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="1180" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end_human" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="Fin — espera
agente humano" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="1190" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ctx"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ctx"
